rationale: Bug fix for Jira DC email-match authentication: when OAuth is disabled, the workspace link is stored with placeholder Jira account IDs, so the webhook's real Jira user key can never match. The fix adds an email-fallback path gated by JIRA_DC_ENABLE_OAUTH so email-match mode works while OAuth mode preserves its strict verified-account-id guarantee. Adds JIRA_DC_REACTION_EMOJI_ID and JIRA_DC_WEBHOOK_EVENTS constants, propagates comment_id through JobContext, distinguishes 'no OpenHands account' from 'account exists but not linked' error messages. Both detectors (mock-of-hallucination and error-swallow) are likely false positives on the unresolved local Python imports and the existing try/except patterns around HTTP calls.
